title: Nighttime Doodle Selfie AI

imagePrompts.prompt: A playful chaotic nighttime selfie captured with a wide-angle smartphone lens and direct flash, featuring an adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair making a fierce playful "rawr" expression toward the camera. She wears an oversized cobalt blue windbreaker jacket, glossy skin highlights, dramatic expression, teeth showing, playful attitude. Urban rooftop night market under canopy lights. The image is covered with hand-drawn doodle illustrations: white cat ears, whiskers, sketch outlines around the subject, stars, arrows, scribbles, and a cute green cartoon dinosaur breathing fire. Bold handwritten graffiti-style sticker text reading "RAWR!", "CURRENT MOOD", and "NOT NORMAL" scattered around the frame. High-contrast flash photography, vibrant colors, candid Y2K aesthetic, scrapbook journaling style, social media sticker art, youthful but adult energy, whimsical chaos, detailed doodles, sharp focus. Adult only, no logo, no watermark, no extra random text. photo style: wide-angle smartphone direct flash, candid Y2K scrapbook energy. subject: adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair, oversized cobalt windbreaker, fierce playful rawr expression. setting: urban rooftop night market under canopy lights. doodles: white cat ears, whiskers, stars, arrows, tiny green dinosaur breathing fire. text stickers: RAWR!, CURRENT MOOD, NOT NORMAL.
imagePrompts.title: Doodle Selfie Asian Woman Rooftop

imagePrompts.prompt: A playful chaotic nighttime selfie captured with a wide-angle smartphone lens and direct flash, featuring an adult white man with shaggy blond hair making an exaggerated playful grin toward the camera. He wears an oversized red rain jacket, glossy flash highlights, energetic street-style attitude. Neon alley outside a late-night food stand. The image is covered with hand-drawn doodle illustrations: devil horns, lightning bolts, skateboard arrows, sketch outlines around the subject, stars, scribbles, and a tiny blue cartoon ghost. Bold handwritten graffiti-style sticker text reading "CHAOS MODE", "TOO LATE", and "LOL NO" scattered around the frame. High-contrast flash photography, vibrant colors, candid Y2K aesthetic, scrapbook journaling style, social media sticker art, whimsical chaos, detailed doodles, sharp focus. Adult only, no logo, no watermark, no extra random text. photo style: phone flash, wide-angle, Y2K street-style selfie. subject: adult white man with shaggy blond hair, oversized red rain jacket, exaggerated playful grin. setting: neon alley outside a late-night food stand. doodles: devil horns, lightning bolts, skateboard arrows, tiny blue ghost, messy outlines. text stickers: CHAOS MODE, TOO LATE, LOL NO.
